
\clearpage

| pH          | N (%)       | C (%) | OM (%) | C/N     | P (ppm) | K (meq/100g) | SO~4~^2-^ |
|---------|---------|---------|---------|---------|---------|---------|---------|
| 5.86        | 0.182       | 1.204 | 2.076    | 6.7     | 24.45   | 0.203        | 16.37     |
: Soil properties. OM stands for organic matter. {#tbl-soil}


| Humidity (%) | pH | C (%) | OM (%) | N total (%) | C/N | P (%) | K (%) | Ca (%) | Mg (%) | Na (%) | Mn (ppm) | Cu (ppm) |
|----------|----------|----------|----------|----------|----------|----------|----------|----------|----------|----------|----------|----------
| 9.4 | 6.44 | 44.0 | 88.0 | 3.46 | 12.7 | 1.12 | 0.6 | 0.01 | 0.43 | 0.04 | 25.5 | 0.5 |
: Characteristics of Black Soldier Fly frass. OM stands for organic matter. {#tbl-frass}
